Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC AND LARISA ESGUIVEL'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055
